user.title: Choose authentication method
user.description: Samsung deprecated indefinite SmartThings Personal Access Tokens on 2024-12-30 — new PATs expire every 24 hours. Reusing the HA core SmartThings integration's OAuth2 credentials avoids this limit entirely.

oauth.title: Reuse SmartThings OAuth credentials
oauth.description: Select an existing HA core SmartThings integration to borrow its OAuth2 credentials. Tokens will refresh automatically.

pat.title: SmartThings Personal Access Token
pat.description: Tokens created after 2024-12-30 expire every 24 hours. You will need to reauthenticate after each expiry.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate SmartThings
reauth_confirm.description: Your SmartThings token has expired. Please enter a new token from https://account.smartthings.com/tokens
